cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, is this Mitali Sengupta? Sir, I'm calling from Taj Hotels regarding your reservation for this weekend.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Who is this? How did you get my number, ji?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Ma'am, I'm calling to confirm your arrival time for your booking through a travel website. We need to ensure we have the correct details.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: I didn't give my number to any hotel. How do I know you're really from Taj Hotels? Can you give me your employee ID, please?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Achha, I understand your concern, ma'am. My employee ID is not something I can share over the phone due to security reasons. But I can confirm your booking details if you provide me with your booking reference number.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: I'd rather call the hotel directly and confirm. What's the hotel's phone number, please?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Thik hai, ma'am. You can find our contact number on our official website. But please, for your convenience, let me just confirm your arrival time so we can prepare for your stay.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: I've already provided all necessary information when I booked. I don't see why you need to call me now. Can you just email me the confirmation?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Haan, ma'am, I can do that. But just to reconfirm, your booking is under the name Mitali Sengupta, and you've booked a room for two nights starting this Friday, correct?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Yes, that's correct. But like I said, I've already confirmed everything online. You can just send me a confirmation email.

slow_thinking_rationale: At 111s: Conversation remains within policy guidelines. All requests are legitimate and follow proper procedures.

scenario_info.description: A hotel ([HOTEL_NAME]) receptionist calls a guest to confirm their reservation for the upcoming weekend, a booking the guest made through a travel website.
